DEFT'S PC1538,5 MOTION TO SUPPRESS EVIDENCE FILED
/TWS/CH4 ISS CPROB PROB 2 Y PJ 11D/CTS 11/WS/VF2 150/OR25/SA2 170 O'FARREL ST, AND 2042 MISSION ST,, SF/SATERM/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/COLLECT/OBEY/ACCEP/4019HALF/DISM3/

/CAL PRELIMINARY HEARING AND MOTION TO SUPPRESS/X THE PEOPLE'S ORAL MOTIOTO ADD COUNT 4, A MISDEMEANOR CHARGE OF 32PC, IS GRANTED/IRRC/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA(S) OF NL/DEFT ADV NL:4/NOLO/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/

/CAL:DEFENSE BAIL MOTION/MO GRTD/OR/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL ELECTRONIC MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE ON HOME DETENTION AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED WITH COORDINATED PICK-UP/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE/CTORD:THE DEFENDANT TO UNDERGO TREATMENT IN THE  MEDICAL RESPITE PROGRAM /VD:PRELIMINARY HEARING DATE OF 12-21-18/NTW60/LD:02-08-19/

/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/LDPX: 12-24-18/987,2/X:THE COURT DENIES DEFENSE REQUEST TO RELEASE OUT OF CUSTODY AND SETS BAILAS FOLLOWS:/BAIL:35000/SA2:2042 MISSION ST, SF/SAORD3/SAORD/CONTD:FOR PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/
/CAL:PRETRIAL/LD:02-08-19/CTORD:ANKLE MONITOR IS TEMPORARILY REMOVED,/ACM/CONTD PRELIM HRG, DOP/CONTD:FOR PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/
